happy.name: Rainbow Acai Bowl
happy.description: Blended acai topped with fresh berries, granola, and coconut flakes.
happy.whyItMatches: Bright colors and natural sweetness mirror an upbeat, celebratory mood.

happy.name: Mango Sticky Rice
happy.description: Sweet mango over warm coconut sticky rice.
happy.whyItMatches: Tropical and indulgent—small joys that feel like a mini vacation.

happy.name: Caprese Skewers
happy.description: Cherry tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil with a drizzle of balsamic.
happy.whyItMatches: Fresh, simple, and party-friendly—great for sharing good vibes.

happy.name: Lemon Sorbet
happy.description: Tart, icy lemon sorbet in a chilled glass.
happy.whyItMatches: Zesty and refreshing—like sunshine in dessert form.

happy.name: Shakshuka
happy.description: Eggs poached in spiced tomato sauce with crusty bread.
happy.whyItMatches: Warm, colorful, and satisfying—comfort that still feels lively.

sad.name: Mac and Cheese
sad.description: Creamy cheddar sauce folded into elbow pasta, baked until golden.
sad.whyItMatches: Classic comfort food—familiar and soothing when you need a hug in a bowl.

sad.name: Chicken Noodle Soup
sad.description: Slow-simmered broth with tender chicken, carrots, and noodles.
sad.whyItMatches: Warm and gentle—often the first thing we reach for when we feel low.

sad.name: Mashed Potatoes & Gravy
sad.description: Buttery mashed potatoes with rich brown gravy.
sad.whyItMatches: Soft textures and savory depth feel grounding and reassuring.

sad.name: Hot Chocolate
sad.description: Real cocoa, steamed milk, and a whisper of vanilla.
sad.whyItMatches: Small ritual of warmth—easy to sip slowly and breathe.

sad.name: Grilled Cheese
sad.description: Crispy buttered bread with melted cheese—dip optional.
sad.whyItMatches: Simple nostalgia; low effort, high emotional payoff.

stressed.name: Oatmeal with Banana & Almonds
stressed.description: Steel-cut oats topped with sliced banana and toasted almonds.
stressed.whyItMatches: Complex carbs and magnesium-rich nuts support steadier energy under pressure.

stressed.name: Salmon & Steamed Greens
stressed.description: Baked salmon with lemon and lightly seasoned broccoli or spinach.
stressed.whyItMatches: Omega-3s and greens feel nourishing without weighing you down.

stressed.name: Chamomile Tea & Whole-Grain Toast
stressed.description: Calming herbal tea with avocado or jam on toast.
stressed.whyItMatches: Ritual + steady fuel—gentle on the nervous system.

stressed.name: Veggie Stir-Fry with Brown Rice
stressed.description: Quick wok of colorful vegetables over fluffy brown rice.
stressed.whyItMatches: Balanced plate that feels proactive—fuel without a sugar crash.

stressed.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
stressed.description: Yogurt layered with berries and a sprinkle of seeds.
stressed.whyItMatches: Protein and probiotics in a format that’s easy to eat between tasks.

tired.name: Banana Peanut Butter Smoothie
tired.description: Blended banana, peanut butter, milk or oat milk, and a pinch of cinnamon.
tired.whyItMatches: Quick energy from natural sugars and healthy fats—minimal prep.

tired.name: Egg Fried Rice
tired.description: Day-old rice stir-fried with eggs, peas, and soy sauce.
tired.whyItMatches: Satisfying carbs and protein in one pan when you’re running on empty.

tired.name: Hummus & Pita
tired.description: Creamy hummus with warm pita and cucumber sticks.
tired.whyItMatches: No-cook option that still feels like a real meal.

tired.name: Trail Mix & Apple
tired.description: Seeds, dried fruit, and dark chocolate with a crisp apple on the side.
tired.whyItMatches: Portable fuel for when standing at the stove feels impossible.

tired.name: Baked Sweet Potato
tired.description: Whole sweet potato with butter or yogurt and a pinch of salt.
tired.whyItMatches: Hands-off oven time—complex carbs for sustained energy.

bored.name: DIY Rice Paper Rolls
bored.description: Rice paper, vermicelli, herbs, and dipping sauce—assemble your own.
bored.whyItMatches: Hands-on and playful; breaks the monotony of the usual routine.

bored.name: Korean Bibimbap Bowl
bored.description: Rice topped with assorted veggies, egg, and gochujang—mix it all up.
bored.whyItMatches: Lots of textures and colors; every bite can be a little different.

bored.name: Build-Your-Own Tacos
bored.description: Warm tortillas with fillings you can mix and match.
bored.whyItMatches: Turns dinner into a small project—good when you need novelty.

bored.name: Spicy Mapo Tofu
bored.description: Silky tofu in a bold, numbing-spicy sauce over rice.
bored.whyItMatches: Big flavor wakes up the palate when everything feels bland.

bored.name: Charcuterie-for-One
bored.description: A few cheeses, crackers, fruit, and something pickled on a board.
bored.whyItMatches: Grazing and arranging gives your brain something low-stakes to do.
